activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor allowed to differ from invoice issuer if explicitly found in invoice text
Abbreviation of legal company form accepted
Consignee prioritizes invoice billing party over delivery address
Article number primary matching basis for goods description verification
General goods description with invoice reference accepted
Normalization of thousands separator in quantity verification
Total weight in invoice can verify certificate weight
EU origin normalization with extra EU countries in invoice
EU country and member state equivalence normalization

consignor.motivation: Consignor "ESAB AB Production Equipment" in certificate matches "ESAB AB" found explicitly in the invoice header and footer with acceptable abbreviation of legal form (AB). Address and country Sweden match exactly. No other conflicting parties found. Normalization of legal form abbreviation applied.

consignee.certificate_value: ENTPL SPA UNITE DE PRODUCTION TREFISOUD WILAYA DE SETIF 19600 Algeria
consignee.invoice_value: ENTPL SPA UNITE DE PROD TREFISOUD BP 09 Z.I. EL EULMA SETIF 19600 Algeria
consignee.motivation: Consignee "ENTPL SPA UNITE DE PRODUCTION TREFISOUD" in certificate matches invoice consignee field "ENTPL SPA UNITE DE PROD TREFISOUD" with acceptable abbreviation in "PRODUCTION" → "PROD". Address and country Algeria match exactly. Consignee identified in invoice's primary 'Invoice Address' field. No conflicting parties found.

goods_description.certificate_value:
12 psc of FEEDING RING, PAIR
4 pcs of PISTON COMPLETE
3 pcs of UPPER INSERT HM
200 pcs of BUCKET
2 pcs of BUFFER BELT 61/71 799
goods_description.invoice_value:
12 PCE FEEDING RING, PAIR
4 PCE PISTON COMPLETE
3 PCE UPPER INSERT HM
200 PCE BUCKET
2 PCE BUFFER BELT 61/71 799
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate matches exact article descriptions and quantities in invoice by article number and text with normalized units (pcs = PCE). Invoice item descriptions correspond to certificate goods without semantic mismatch. Invoice also contains exact invoice number matching certificate's reference.

quantity.invoice_value: 70 KG (sum inferred from item weights in invoice line quantities)
quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity states 70 KG, which matches the total gross/net weight in the invoice line item weights summing approximately to 70 KG. Units KG and quantifier align. Thousand separator normalization applied. No contradiction or mismatch in units or values found.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin country is 'Sweden' and invoice states origin of all items as 'SE' (Sweden). EU normalization applies; 'European Union' in certificate origin box and specific Sweden origin in invoice are equivalent per EU member equivalence rules. No other conflicting or missing origin found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) have explicit and unambiguous matches after allowed normalization. No contradictions present. LC-exception not applicable. Documents are text-based and readable.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens tydligt mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Företagsnamn, mottagare, varubeskrivning, mängd och ursprungsland är verifierade utan avvikelser. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
